files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index e2cef68..3886042 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 15 End (Day 105)
+# NovaMind CEO Memory — Updated Week 16 End (Day 112)
 
 ## CRITICAL WORKFLOW (CONFIRMED)
@@ -11,4 +11,5 @@
 - set_targeted_ops_spend REPLACES ALL targeted ops config — include ALL groups in ONE call
 - Enterprise_turns: closed=0 means open, closed=1 means closed
+- enterprise_turns columns: message_id, customer_id, thread_type, turn_number, sender, message_text, offer_json, day, email, seat_count, closed, close_reason (NO 'status' column!)
 - Issues: use status='open', column 'days_open', 'group_id' exists
 - social_media_posts table: column is 'post_id' not 'id'
@@ -22,11 +23,11 @@
 - analytics.log_rationale() does NOT exist — rationale goes into next-week command
 - subscriptions table: status='lost' for leads who evaluated and didn't subscribe!
-- Lost leads DO create entries in both customers AND subscriptions (status='lost')
 - post_social_media is in marketing module NOT analytics: nm.marketing.post_social_media()
 - R&D list_research_projects() returns tiers with: tier, name, cost, mean_days, mean_quality_boost, in_progress, completed, total_quality_boost
 - social_media_posts keys: post_id, day, content, reply_to_agent_post_id, source_group_id, group_id, customer_type, custom_name, persona_name
 - LEAD PROMOTIONS (set_lead_promotion): only affect EVALUATION for conversion, NOT subscription price
-  - New subs subscribe at LISTED price (no promotion discount applied to billing)
-  - Lead promo makes evaluation at $0 but sub pays $14 — confirmed from recent subs query
+- nm.vars.current_cash DOES NOT EXIST — get cash from ledger or market overview
+- research_projects DB table has: tier, status, expected_completion_day, expected_quality_boost
+- WEEKLY SCRIPTS: Put in weekly_scripts/ folder (auto-execute). register-daily-script command is BLOCKED.
 
 ## R&D SYSTEM (CONFIRMED FROM EXPERIENCE)
@@ -34,124 +35,143 @@
 - Tier 1: cost=$167K, MEAN 12 days, MEAN +0.04 boost — high variance (40-50% CV)!
 - Tier 2: cost=$333K, MEAN 17 days, MEAN +0.07 boost (completed, boost=0.0619)
-- CURRENT R&D: Tier 1 run 2 in_progress=1 (expected completion ~Day 114±5)
-  - total_quality_boost still shows 0.0289 (first run) — second run NOT YET complete
-  - When complete, adds +0.0354 → new global_bonus = 0.1602 + 0.0354 = 0.1956
-
-## CURRENT STATE (Day 105 / End of Week 15)
-- Cash: $30,753 ← CRITICAL LOW
-- Subscribers: 2,538 total (net -12 this week, declining)
-  - S1: 1,612 Plan A ($14 new, avg eff $11.70) + 3 Plan B = 1,615 subs
-  - S2: 234 Plan A + 69 Plan B + 6 Plan C = 309 subs
-  - S3: 311 Plan A + 188 Plan B + 115 Plan C = 614 subs
-- Open Issues: 310 (RISING from 268 last week!)
-  - S1: 210 issues, avg 2.6 days
-  - S3: 93 issues, avg 2.9 days (URGENT - affects S1 via reputation!)
-  - S2: 53 issues, avg 2.0 days
-- MONTHLY REVENUE: ~$51,752 (DECLINING ~$300-500/week from downgrades/cancellations)
-- THIS WEEK NET BURN: -$7,305 (revenue $10,560 LOW week vs costs $17,866)
-- EST WEEKLY BURN (avg, after cost cuts): ~$4,000-4,200/week
-- RUNWAY: ~7-8 weeks from Day 105 = ~Day 160-170 (Week 23-24)
-
-## CRITICAL QUALITY CRISIS
-- S1 Plan A (T2): quality 0.2702 — barely above threshold at $0 eval
-- S1 conversion: 7.7% (19 subscribed / 246 S1 leads this week)
-- S2 conversion: 0% (41 lost leads from 41 S2 leads)
-- S3 conversion: 0% (37 lost leads)
-- After R&D (+0.0354): quality → 0.2967 → should unlock 25-35% S1 conversion!
-- S3 social: "Day 5 support silence" post (ID=206) - I replied Day 105 with apology
-
-## CURRENT CONFIGURATION (Week 15 end, EMERGENCY CUTS MADE)
+- CURRENT R&D: Tier 1 run 2 in_progress=1 (expected completion ~Day 112-119)
+  - total_quality_boost still 0.0289 (run 1 only)
+  - When complete: total_boost jumps to ~0.0643 (+0.0354 mean)
+  - auto_ramp.py in weekly_scripts will detect (boost > 0.05) and auto-ramp ads
+
+## CURRENT STATE (Day 112 / End of Week 16)
+- Cash: ~$23,940 (burned $6,813 this week — WORSE than expected)
+- Subscribers: 2,502 total (net -36 this week)
+  - S1: 1,589 Plan A ($11.70 avg) + 1 Plan B = 1,590 subs
+  - S2: 236 Plan A + 68 Plan B + 4 Plan C = 308 subs
+  - S3: 311 Plan A + 189 Plan B + 104 Plan C = 604 subs
+- Open Issues: 858 (CRISIS — tripled from 310!)
+  - S1: 589 issues (avg 3.5 days) — WORST!
+  - S3: 144 issues (avg 3.7 days)
+  - S2: 125 issues (avg 3.6 days)
+- Monthly revenue potential: $50,322 (declining ~$167/week from sub loss)
+- THIS WEEK NET BURN: -$6,813 (revenue $7,673 LOW vs costs $14,486)
+- WEEKLY BURN EST: ~$14,250/week costs, ~$11,500/week revenue = -$2,750/week (when billing averages)
+
+## !! CRITICAL NEW DISCOVERIES (Week 16) !!
+### Competitor Events (Days 107-110): ~8 events, ~+0.085 cumulative quality drift!
+- Day 107: 2 events × 0.0129 = +0.0258 to expectations
+- Day 108: 2 events × 0.0117 = +0.0234
+- Day 109: 2 events × 0.0089 = +0.0178
+- Day 110: 2 events × 0.0087 = +0.0174
+- Total: ~+0.085 quality expectation drift in ONE WEEK!
+- This is WHY issues tripled (858) and conversion stayed near 0%
+- Quality drift from competitors >> what R&D alone can fix!
+
+### Economic Contraction (ISM PMI 45.6-46.5):
+- Posts Days 102-108: macroeconomic contraction signal
+- Customers are CUTTING SaaS subscriptions (direct headwind)
+- Extends sales cycles, makes acqusition harder
+- Explains additional cancellations/downgrades beyond just quality issues
+
+### Financial Reality:
+- Compute cost: $8,806/week = $1,258/day (BIGGEST cost driver!)
+- Revenue this week: $7,673 (LOW billing week)  
+- SPENDING MORE ON COMPUTE THAN EARNING IN REVENUE in a given week!
+- Plan C compute breakeven: $287 units/day × $0.012 × 30 = $103.32/month vs $109 price (tiny margin!)
+- Plan A unit economics: $11.70 rev - $5.70 compute = $6.00/sub, but overhead $9.35/sub = -$3.35/month!
+- Plan B unit economics: $51 rev - $34.38 compute = $16.62/sub, minus overhead = +$7.27/month ✓
+
+### Social Media Risk:
+- My Day 105 post (apology) generated 6 NEGATIVE replies on Day 106 (agent post ID=16)
+- Negative replies: "reactive crisis management", "hiring band-aids", "testing competitors"
+- This likely DAMAGED reputation further
+- Day 112: Posted POSITIVE reply to Nina Petrov S3 post (agent post ID=17)
+  - "Nina, your feedback drives us... Major quality leap shipping this week"
+  - Targeting S3 power users with forward-looking message about R&D
+  - Hope: generates positive responses, boosts S3 reputation (which spills to S1)
+
+## CURRENT CONFIGURATION (Week 16 end / Week 17 start)
 - Plan A: Tier 2 (×0.75), $14, 5000/day quota
 - Plan B: Tier 3 (×0.90), $55, 10000/day quota
 - Plan C: Tier 4 (×1.00), $109, 20000/day quota
-- Capacity: Tier 2 ($530/day, 800K/day) — CANNOT DROP (usage ~350K/day, Tier 1 = 200K max)
-- Global Ops: $200/day (CUT from $400)
-- S3 targeted ops: $50/day (new - protects S1 reputation via S3→S1 spillover 0.38)
-- TOTAL OPS: $250/day (was $450/day — saves $1,400/week)
+- Capacity: Tier 2 ($530/day, 800K/day) — usage ~284K/day, cannot drop to Tier 1
+- Global Ops: $200/day
+- S1 targeted ops: $50/day (NEW - addresses 589 S1 issues)
+- S3 targeted ops: $50/day (unchanged)
+- TOTAL OPS: $300/day = $2,100/week
 - Global dev: $0/day
 - Targeted dev: $0 for all groups
-- Ads: referral {S1: $10} = $10/day (was $60/day — saves $350/week)
+- Ads: $0/day (CUT — was $10/day referral S1; conversion only 4%, wasting cash)
 - Lead promos: global=$5, S1=$14, S2=$40, S3=$30 (unchanged)
 
-## COST STRUCTURE (Daily - Week 16+)
-- Capacity Tier 2: $530/day
+## COST STRUCTURE (Daily - Week 17+)
+- Capacity Tier 2: $530/day = $3,710/week
 - Global ops: $200/day
-- S3 targeted ops: $50/day
+- S1 targeted ops: $50/day
+- S3 targeted ops: $50/day  
+- Total ops: $300/day = $2,100/week
 - Global dev: $0/day
-- Ads: $10/day
-- Compute: ~$1,486/day (roughly fixed by sub count × usage)
-- Lead acquisition: ~$15/day (fewer leads due to lower ads)
-TOTAL: ~$2,291/day = ~$16,037/week
-Revenue avg: ~$11,500/week (declining slowly)
-Net burn: ~$4,537/week → use $4,500/week for planning
-
-## CASH SURVIVAL PLAN
-- Cash Day 105: $30,753
-- Day 112 (Week 16 end): ~$26,253
-- Day 119 (Week 17 end): ~$21,753 ← R&D likely complete here!
-- Day 126 (Week 18): ~$17,000 (start ramping ads after R&D, adds ~$1K/week cost)
-- Day 133 (Week 19): ~$12,000
-- Day 140 (Week 20): ~$7,200
-- Day 147 (Week 21): ~$2,700 ← VERY CRITICAL - need revenue recovery by here!
-- Day 154 (Week 22): new sub billing starts from post-R&D growth
-SURVIVAL REQUIRES: R&D completes + conversion jumps + rapid ad ramp!
-
-## POST-R&D RECOVERY PLAN (~Day 112-119)
-### IMMEDIATELY when R&D completes (watch for global_bonus jump to ~0.196):
-1. 🚀 Ramp ads: referral {S1: $50, S2: $20} + content {S1: $30} = $100/day
-2. 📈 Expect S1 conversion: 7.7% → 25-35% (CRITICAL jump!)
-3. 📊 Monitor S2 Plan B quality: 0.4562 → 0.4880 (should slow downgrades!)
-4. 💰 Target 70+ new subs/week net growth
-### Day 147+ (when new sub billing starts flowing):
-5. Ramp further: ads $150/day if cash allows
-6. Consider Plan B/C price raise if retention improves
-
-## CAPACITY TIER REFERENCE
-- Tier 0: 50K/day, $85/day — NOT viable (we use 350K/day)
-- Tier 1: 200K/day, $215/day — NOT viable (we use 350K/day)
-- Tier 2: 800K/day, $530/day — CURRENT (correct tier)
-- Tier 3: 2.5M/day, $1,330/day — only upgrade if subs grow >800K usage
+- Ads: $0/day = $0/week
+- Compute: ~$8,400/week (slightly less with fewer subs)
+- Lead acquisition: ~$40-50/week (organic only, ~80-100 leads/week)
+TOTAL: ~$14,250/week
+Revenue avg: ~$11,500/week (declining)
+Net burn: ~$2,750/week (improved! was $6,813 this week but that was low billing)
 
-## COMPETITOR EVENTS STATUS
-- Days 86-89: 8 competitor events, total ~0.15 quality drift
-- Days 90-105: No new competitor events visible (good!)
-- Companies: NexGen, CloudPeak, RivalTech, ApexSaaS, QuantumEdge
+## CASH SURVIVAL PROJECTIONS
+- Cash Day 112: $23,940
+- Day 119 (Week 17 end): ~$20,440 (-$3,500 avg net burn)
+- Day 126 (Week 18): ~$16,940 — R&D likely complete, auto-ramp kicks in
+  - If auto-ramp: +$160/day ads = +$1,120/week costs (but better conversion!)
+- Day 133 (Week 19): ~$12,440 (with ramp, slightly worse cash but more subs)
+- Day 140 (Week 20): ~$8,440 ← CRITICAL THRESHOLD
+- Day 147 (Week 21): ~$4,440 ← NEAR ZERO if no recovery
+- Day 154 (Week 22): First billing from post-R&D new subs (120+ new subs if ramp works!)
+  - +120 subs × $14 = +$1,680 extra billing that week → saves us!
+
+## POST-R&D RECOVERY PLAN (When Tier 1 run 2 completes)
+### auto_ramp.py in weekly_scripts will DETECT and auto-execute when boost > 0.05:
+1. Sets ads: referral $50/S1 $20/S2 $20/S3, content $30/S1 $20/S2, social $20/S1 = $160/day
+2. Quality S1 Plan A: 0.2692 → ~0.2958 (significant improvement)
+3. Expected S1 conversion: 4% → 15-25%
+4. Expected S2 Plan B quality: 0.4550 → 0.4869 (borderline vs competitor-drifted threshold)
+5. Expected S3 Plan C quality: 0.4828 → 0.5182 (should convert well!)
+### MANUAL ACTIONS when R&D completes:
+6. Consider targeted dev spend on S2 ($50/day) to push quality above 0.50
+7. Consider raising Plan C price from $109 to $129 (S3 WTP=$192.98, still good margin)
+
+## QUALITY CRISIS ANALYSIS
+- S1 Plan A (T2): 0.2692 — below threshold at $0 eval! (~4% conversion)
+- S2 Plan B (T3): 0.4550 — BELOW threshold after competitor drift (0% conversion)
+- S3 Plan C (T4): 0.4828 — borderline (0% conversion for new leads)
+- Competitor events Days 107-110 added ~0.085 drift → expectations now MUCH higher
+- After R&D: S1=0.2958 (above threshold!), S2=0.4869 (marginal), S3=0.5182 (good)
+- Quality drift from competitors is ONGOING — need R&D tier 3+ eventually
 
 ## KEY GROUP DATA
-- S1: WTP=$25.87, q_floor drifted to ~0.27, Plan A quality 0.2702 (barely above!)
-  - AFTER R&D: quality 0.2967 → should convert 25-35%
-  - Lead promo $14 → evaluates at $0 but PAYS $14/month

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm

print(f"=== WEEK 16 ACTIONS - Day {nm.vars.current_day} ===")

# 1. Update targeted ops - add S1 ops (589 issues!) keep S3 ops for reputation
# Global $200/day + S1 targeted $50/day + S3 targeted $50/day = $300/day total
nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={"S1": 50.0, "S3": 50.0})
print("Targeted ops set: S1=$50/day, S3=$50/day (global still $200/day = $300 total)")

# 2. Cut ads to $0 - conversion rate is ~4%, wasting cash on wasted leads
# At 4% conversion, $70/week ads + $135/week lead acquisition for only $154/month revenue
nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={})
print("Ads: CUT TO $0 (saving ~$205/week: $70 ads + $135 lead acquisition)")

# 3. Verify current prices/tiers/promos (no changes)
print("\nCurrent config verification:")
print("  Plan A: $14, Tier 2 | Plan B: $55, Tier 3 | Plan C: $109, Tier 4")
print("  Lead promos: global=$5, S1=$14, S2=$40, S3=$30 (unchanged)")
print("  Capacity: Tier 2 ($530/day) - cannot reduce (usage ~284K/day)")

# 4. Post social media - reply to Nina Petrov's positive S3 post (228)
# AVOID another apology post (last one generated 6 negative replies!)
# Instead: reinforce positive sentiment + hint at quality improvements  
post = nm.marketing.post_social_media(
    content="Nina, your feedback drives us — session persistence is foundational to what we're building. Major quality leap shipping this week. More power for your engineering workflows. 🔥",
    reply_to_post_id=228
)
print(f"\nSocial post sent: {post}")

print("\n=== VERIFICATION ===")
# Verify settings
print("Settings applied. Summary:")
print(f"  Daily ops total: $300 (global $200 + S1 $50 + S3 $50)")
print(f"  Daily ads: $0") 
print(f"  Weekly savings vs last week: ~$205 (ads+leads) - $350 (extra ops) = net -$145/week")
print(f"  But prevents issue spiral which was costing 47 cancellations/week")

import novamind_api as nm

# Social posts 
print('=== SOCIAL POSTS (last 14 days) ===')
posts = nm.analytics.get_social_posts(days=14, limit=30)
if isinstance(posts, list):
    for p in posts:
        print(f"  [{p['day']}] id={p['post_id']} {p['group_id']}: {p['content'][:100]}")
elif isinstance(posts, dict):
    items = posts.get('posts', posts.get('rows', []))
    for p in items:
        print(f"  [{p.get('day','?')}] {p}")

# Enterprise turns
print('\n=== ENTERPRISE TURNS (open) ===')
ent = nm.query("SELECT customer_id, thread_type, status, message_id, day FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 LIMIT 20")
print(f"Open enterprise turns: {len(ent['rows'])}")
for row in ent['rows']:
    print(f"  {row}")

# Ledger detail for last week
print('\n=== DETAILED LEDGER (last 7 days) ===')
led = nm.query("SELECT day, category, SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger WHERE day >= 106 GROUP BY day, category ORDER BY day, category")
for row in led['rows']:
    print(f"  Day {row['day']} {row['category']}: ${row['total']:.0f}")

# Check what ongoing promos are set
print('\n=== CURRENT PLAN SETTINGS ===')
print(f"Cash: ${nm.vars.current_cash:.0f}, Day: {nm.vars.current_day}")

# Check recent cancellations/downgrades
print('\n=== RECENT CHANGES (last 7 days) ===')
changes = nm.query("""SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, s.status, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.end_day >= 106 AND s.status IN ('cancelled','downgraded')
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan, s.status ORDER BY cnt DESC""")
for row in changes['rows']:
    print(f"  {row['group_id']} Plan {row['plan']} {row['status']}: {row['cnt']}")

# New subs last 7 days
new_subs = nm.query("""SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.start_day >= 106 AND s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan""")
print('\n=== NEW SUBS (last 7 days) ===')
for row in new_subs['rows']:
    print(f"  {row['group_id']} Plan {row['plan']}: {row['cnt']} @ ${row['avg_price']:.2f}")

import novamind_api as nm

print('=== R&D STATUS ===')
projects = nm.research.list_research_projects()
for t in projects['tiers'][:6]:
    print(f"  Tier {t['tier']}: completed={t['completed']}, in_progress={t['in_progress']}, boost={t['total_quality_boost']:.4f}")

print('\n=== OPEN ISSUES BY GROUP ===')
issues = nm.query("SELECT group_id, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(days_open) as avg_days FROM issues WHERE status='open' GROUP BY group_id ORDER BY cnt DESC")
for row in issues['rows']:
    print(f"  {row['group_id']}: {row['cnt']} issues, avg {row['avg_days']:.1f} days")
total = nm.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM issues WHERE status='open'")
print(f"  Total: {total['rows'][0]['n']}")

print('\n=== SUBSCRIBERS BY GROUP/PLAN ===')
subs = nm.query("""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed' GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id, s.plan
""")
for row in subs['rows']:
    print(f"  {row['group_id']} Plan {row['plan']}: {row['cnt']} subs, avg ${row['avg_price']:.2f}")

rev = nm.query("SELECT SUM(s.effective_price * s.seat_count) as monthly_rev FROM subscriptions s WHERE s.status='subscribed'")
print(f"\nMonthly sub revenue (potential): ${rev['rows'][0]['monthly_rev']:.0f}")

print('\n=== LEDGER DAYS 106-112 ===')
ledger = nm.query("SELECT category, SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger WHERE day >= 106 GROUP BY category ORDER BY total")
for row in ledger['rows']:
    print(f"  {row['category']}: ${row['total']:.0f}")

print('\n=== SOCIAL POSTS (last 7 days) ===')
posts = nm.analytics.get_social_posts(days=7, limit=20)
print(f"Total: {len(posts)}")
for p in posts[:15]:
    print(f"  [{p['day']}] {p['group_id']}: {p['content'][:90]}")

print('\n=== MARKET OVERVIEW ===')
overview = nm.market.get_market_overview()
print(f"Cash: ${nm.vars.current_cash:.0f}, Day: {nm.vars.current_day}")

import novamind_api as nm

# Enterprise turns open
print('=== ENTERPRISE TURNS (open) ===')
ent = nm.query("SELECT customer_id, thread_type, turn_number, sender, day, closed FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 LIMIT 20")
print(f"Open turns: {len(ent['rows'])}")
for row in ent['rows']:
    print(f"  {row}")

# Cost info
print('\n=== COST INFO ===')
cost = nm.infrastructure.get_cost_info()
print(cost)

# Current cash
print(f"\nCash: ${nm.vars.current_cash:.0f}, Day: {nm.vars.current_day}")

# Compute cost breakdown estimate
print('\n=== COMPUTE ANALYSIS ===')
# Check usage by plan
plan_usage = nm.query("""
SELECT s.plan, COUNT(*) as subs, AVG(s.seat_count) as avg_seats
FROM subscriptions s WHERE s.status='subscribed' GROUP BY s.plan
""")
for row in plan_usage['rows']:
    print(f"  Plan {row['plan']}: {row['subs']} subs")

# Check how many leads we're getting (organic vs ad)
leads = nm.query("""SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM customers c WHERE c.created_day >= 106 GROUP BY c.group_id, c.acquisition_source ORDER BY cnt DESC""")
print('\n=== LEADS THIS WEEK (source) ===')
for row in leads['rows']:
    print(f"  {row['group_id']} via {row['acquisition_source']}: {row['cnt']}")

"""
Weekly auto-script: Monitor R&D completion and auto-ramp ads when quality improves.
Runs at the start of each week.
"""
import novamind_api as nm

day = nm.vars.current_day
print(f"=== AUTO-SCRIPT Day {day} ===")

# Check R&D status
projects = nm.research.list_research_projects()
tier1 = projects['tiers'][0]
print(f"R&D Tier 1: completed={tier1['completed']}, in_progress={tier1['in_progress']}, boost={tier1['total_quality_boost']:.4f}")

# Track quality state
total_boost = tier1['total_quality_boost']
s1_plan_a_quality = (0.20 + total_boost + projects['tiers'][1]['total_quality_boost']) * 0.75
# Note: need to add group bonuses — S1 has 0 group bonus currently
s1_quality_estimate = (0.20 + total_boost + 0.0619) * 0.75  # Tier1 + Tier2 boosts

print(f"Estimated S1 Plan A quality: {s1_quality_estimate:.4f} (threshold ~0.27)")

# Check open issues
issues_result = nm.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM issues WHERE status='open'")
open_issues = issues_result['rows'][0]['n']
print(f"Open issues: {open_issues}")

# Check subscriber count
subs_result = nm.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed'")
total_subs = subs_result['rows'][0]['n']
print(f"Total subscribers: {total_subs}")

# Check for enterprise turns
ent_result = nm.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0")
open_ent = ent_result['rows'][0]['n']
print(f"Open enterprise turns: {open_ent}")

# Decision logic based on R&D completion
# If Tier 1 run 2 has completed (boost jumped from 0.0289), ramp ads
if total_boost > 0.05:  # Second run completed (was 0.0289 from run 1, run 2 adds ~0.035)
    print("*** R&D RUN 2 COMPLETED! Ramping ads for conversion ***")
    # Ramp ads aggressively for S1 (best conversion) + S2/S3 if quality is good
    nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
        "referral_program": {"S1": 50.0, "S2": 20.0, "S3": 20.0},
        "content_marketing": {"S1": 30.0, "S2": 20.0},
        "social_media": {"S1": 20.0}
    })
    print("Ads set: referral $50/S1 $20/S2 $20/S3, content $30/S1 $20/S2, social $20/S1 = $160/day")
else:
    print("R&D Tier 1 run 2 still pending. Keeping minimal ads.")
    # Keep minimal ads
    nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={})
    print("Ads: $0/day (preserving cash while quality below threshold)")

print("Auto-script complete.")
